title: Amazon Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Amazon Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Amazon Logistics India! We are hiring a Warehouse Manager for our Nagpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Amazon Logistics India:
Amazon Logistics India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon Logistics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
